retrieved_result: XML Parser \"XML Parser❮ Previous Next ❯All major browsers have a built-in XML parser to access and manipulate XML. history.description: "XML Parser❮ Previous Next ❯All major browsers have a built-in XML parser to access and manipulate XML. XML Parser The XML DOM (Document Object Model) defines the properties and methods for accessing and editing XML. However, before an XML document can be accessed, it must be loaded into an XML DOM
